notes: Per-site comparison of contact record counts from two sources. n_contacts_snapshot: semicolon-delimited entries in team_member_name field. n_contacts_badm: distinct GROUP_IDs with TEAM_MEMBER_NAME or TEAM_CONTACT_NAME in BADM GRP_TEAM/TEAM_MEMBER/TEAM_CONTACT groups. badm_has_more=TRUE indicates BADM has additional contacts not in the snapshot; these are not automatically included in authorship_invitations.csv (snapshot is primary). Sorted: badm_has_more DESC, difference DESC.
